name: the write-time hook allows a clean write without blocking
command:
printf '# 0002. Storage

## Decision

Use Postgres with encrypted volumes.
' > 0002-store.md && printf '{"tool_input":{"file_path":"%s/0002-store.md"}}' "$PWD" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-on-save.sh" && echo allowed 1>&2
